final:
module RefModule(
    input d,  
    input clk,  
    input rstn,  
    output reg q,  
    output qn);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn or posedge dbg_halt)  
      if (!rstn) q <= 0;  
      else q <= d;  
    assign qn = ~q;endmodule
